body: I never received the deposit invoice. The event is October 17 and I want to make sure I pay on time.
Gabriela, sorry about that. I'll resend the invoice to this email address right now.
Got it, thank you. Paying today.
The vendor portal just spins and then times out. Cannot submit the housekeeping schedule.
Looking into the portal issue with the hotel IT contact. Will follow up by end of day.
Can you email me the signed contract as a PDF? I need it for my records.
Attached the signed PDF. Let me know if you need anything else.
The photo slideshow was removed from my package five days ago but I still do not see the refund.
The florist arrival is at 2pm but court rehearsal starts at 2pm in the same ballroom. We need to sort this out.
Contacting Emerald Hall to push florist setup to noon. Will confirm with both parties.
